hero.descripcion: I develop real-time applications with Node.js and Socket.IO. I also implement interfaces with React. Focused on creating efficient solutions.

sobreMi.parrafo1: I am a SENA apprentice in Analysis and Software Development (ADSO) currently in productive stage. I have training in the complete software development lifecycle, from requirements analysis to deployment.
sobreMi.parrafo2: I specialize in web development with Node.js and real-time applications. I also implement interfaces with React. I am looking for an opportunity to apply my knowledge in a real environment, contribute value, and keep learning.

contacto.descripcion: I am available to do my productive internship (practices) in web development. Send me a message.
